pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies 'Create and deploy a channel named HL7_Message_Router'. Verified against export_result.sh which searches for channels with 'router' or 'hl7' in the name.
task.json description states 'TCP Listener on port 6661 (MLLP)'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh instructions and export_result.sh test message sending logic.
task.json description specifies 'ADT_Destination, Output Dir: /tmp/output/adt/'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 14) and export_result.sh (lines 42-43) which creates and verifies this directory.
task.json description specifies 'ORM_Destination, Output Dir: /tmp/output/orm/'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 14) and export_result.sh (lines 42-43) which creates and verifies this directory.
task.json description specifies 'ORU_Destination, Output Dir: /tmp/output/oru/'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 14) and export_result.sh (lines 42-43) which creates and verifies this directory.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves configuring a content-based routing channel named 'HL7_Message_Router' in NextGen Connect that listens on TCP port 6661 using MLLP protocol. The channel is designed to route HL7 v2.3 messages to three specific output directories based on message type (MSH-9 field): ADT messages to /tmp/output/adt/, ORM messages to /tmp/output/orm/, and ORU messages to /tmp/output/oru/. The synthetic test data includes three properly formatted HL7 messages with correct message type codes (ADT^A01, ORM^O01, ORU^R01) and message IDs (MSG001, MSG002, MSG003).
